titleStmt.title: SII 41.77: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 77. (A.R. No. 76 of 1905.) Tirumōgūr, Madurai Taluk, Madurai District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa of the Kālamēgha-Perumāḷ temple at Tirumōgūr.

summary.p: Gift of land by Basavana-Nayaka Timmappa-Nayaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Etat svarāsvarāthiśa mauli mālāpibhūṣitam . śrīmanmohūranāthasya bhratyala gigasya śāsanam . svastiśrīśakāptam1000 4 100 7 10 3ṉ mel cellā niṉṟa virodhikrat samvatsarattu Uttarāyāṇattu heman=ta ṛtuvil makaranāyaṟṟu purva pakṣattu dvitiyaiyum bhauma vāramum śravaṇa nakṣatramum siddhayogamum kaulavākaraṇamum peṟṟa makara saṅkramapuṇyakālattil perumāḷ kālameghampaḷḷikoṇṭa perumāḷ śrī samsāra kāriyattukkuk kaṭavom sthāna samayattil Uḷḷavarkaḷom pasapaṇa nāyakka timmappaṉāyakkaṟku perumāḷ tiruvuḷḷam paṟṟiṉa tirumukappaṭikkuk koṭutta sthāna viniyOgapaṭṭayam
muṉṉāḷ nām perumāḷ kāḷameghampaḷḷikoṇṭaperumāḷukku nityanaivedyam kālasanḍhiyil daddhodana Avasarattukku mel Iraṇṭām Avasaramummuṭaiya perāl kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭu Inta Avasarattukku tiruvuṭaiāṭṭamāka viṭṭa grāmaṅkaḷāvaṉa madhuramaṇdhalattuc cīrmaiyil kalaveḻvi nāṭṭu nālu koṭṭai cīrmaiyil tiruviṭai Āṭṭamāka perumāḷukku ṉīr samapitta māṉkuḻi māṉkuḻi grāmaṅkaḷum Itukku Uḷpaṭṭa ṉāṉkellaiyum nāṉkellaikkum Uḷpaṭṭa Ēntalkaḷum Uḷḷiṭṭa nañcai puñcai nattam paṭukai māvaṭai maravaṭai kuṭikkaṭamai kaṟavaik kāṇikkai
taṟikkaṭamai paḷavari pācivilai maṟṟum nāḷatu varaiyum naṭantu varukiṟa samasta prāptiyum Uḷpaṭa poṉmutal kalipoṉ muppattāṟum nel mutal Eṭṭupaṭikkālāl nellu ṉāṉūṟṟu Aṉpatiṉ kalam Intap poṉṉukkum nellukkum Ivar perumāḷukku nityanaivedyam kāla sanḍhiyil daddhodana Avasarattiṉ mel Iraṇṭām Avasaramivar perāl kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭukaiyil nāḷ Oṉṟukku Avasararamoṉṟukku tūṇip patakku Amutupaṭikku kalaṉe mukkuṟuṇi nellākavum Inta naivedyattukku mel veccanattukku kaṟiamutu neyi Amutu sambhāram tirumpaṉām camaippār kūli Uḷpaṭa pala cilavukku Oru paṇam Ākavum Āka Inta vakaiyil varuṣam Oṉṟukku kūṭiṉa
nellu ṉāṉūṟṟaṉpatiṅ kalattukkum poṉ muppattāṟukkum Inta paṭi kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭu tiruvuḷaiyāṭṭamāka Inta grāmaṅkaḷ Ivar perumāḷukku samapittapaṭiyiṉāle Ivarukku perumāḷ kāṇi Āṭciyākat tiruviḷampaṟṟiṉa paṭikku cilavukku perumāḷ Amutu ceyita prasādattil kāla sanḍhiyil Iraṇṭām Avasarattil tūṇippatakku Amutupaṭi prasādattil Ivarukku ṉālil Oṉṟukku ṉāḷ Oṉṟukku Amutupaṭippaṭi viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻi prasādamum perumāḷ māṭaittiruvītiyule Orumaṉaiyum perumāḷ tiruvuḷḷam putrapautra pārampiriyāna dānādhivinimaya vikrayaṅkaḷu ṉupavittu koḷḷavum Immaruvātikku nāṅkaḷe naṭatti varakkaṭavomākavum ..
Digital edition of SII 41.77 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
